scenario: Lead immediately demands to book without sharing any treatment interest or timeline; Alex must qualify before proceeding to booking

turns.content: I want to book an appointment. What slots do you have this week?

mustAsk: what treatment or concern they are interested in
mustDo: gather treatment interest before offering slots

turns.content: Just book me in for whatever. I don't know what I want yet.

mustDo: ask at least one qualifying question about treatment interest before offering booking link or slots
shouldDo: frame qualification as helping them get the most out of their visit
